name: Name
only_letters_numbers: Only letters and numbers are allowed
add_first: Tap the + button to add one
logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
scanner_instruction: Center the symptom inside the frame to analyze it.
scanner_ready: Camera ready to start the analysis.
scanner_camera_unavailable: No rear camera was found on this device.
scanner_camera_denied: Camera permission is required to use the scanner.
profile_need_internet_avatar: You need internet to change your profile photo
offline_login_first_time: No connection. Sign in with internet at least once.
internet_required_default: You need an internet connection for this action.
confirm_email_first: You must confirm your email before signing in.
manage_livestock: Manage your livestock health with AI
password_weak: Password does not meet security requirements
wait_email: Wait a few seconds before requesting another email.
forgot_subtitle: Don't worry. Enter your email and we'll send you instructions to reset it.
email_sent: A link has been sent to your email to recover your password.
new_password_subtitle: For security, enter a password you haven't used before.
password_min_8: Password must be at least 8 characters
delete_notification_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this notification?
notifications_need_internet: You need internet to schedule notifications
username_in_use: That username is already in use
account_already_exists: An account with this email already exists
profile_save_error: Supabase rejected the initial profile save. Check the profiles table or trigger, especially the user_type field.
delete_animal_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this animal?
diagnosis_real_subtitle: Select an animal from "My Animals", write the symptoms in free text, and the AI will analyze the case. The camera is optional.
diagnosis_symptoms_hint: Describe the symptoms in detail. You can separate them with commas or line breaks.
diagnosis_saved_message: Diagnosis saved to the medical history.
diagnosis_save_error: The diagnosis could not be saved
diagnosis_load_animals_error: The animals could not be loaded
diagnosis_register_animal_first: You need to register an animal in "My Animals" before running a real diagnosis.
diagnosis_select_animal_first: You must select an animal first.
diagnosis_write_case_first: Write the reason or symptoms before analyzing.
diagnosis_invalid_temperature: Temperature must be a valid number, for example 39.5, or be left empty.
diagnosis_prepare_message: Select an animal and write symptoms or the main concern before analyzing.
diagnosis_local_mode_message: There is no internet connection. The diagnosis will continue with the local backup engine.
diagnosis_ready_message: The app will try to use remote AI and, if it is unavailable, it will switch to the local engine automatically.
diagnosis_remote_completed_message: Remote AI generated a structured report ready to show or save in Supabase.
diagnosis_fallback_message: Remote AI was unavailable or the function is not deployed yet, so the local backup engine was used.
diagnosis_offline_completed_message: The diagnosis was completed with the local engine because there was no internet connection.
diagnosis_remote_invalid_format: The diagnosis function did not return a valid format.
diagnosis_remote_invalid_report: The diagnosis function did not return a valid report.
diagnosis_remote_supabase_error: The diagnosis could not be completed from Supabase. Please try again.
diagnosis_remote_no_output: The AI did not return output text.
diagnosis_openai_missing_key: OPENAI_API_KEY must be configured with --dart-define to use real AI diagnosis.
diagnosis_openai_connection_error: The AI connection failed. Check your internet connection and try again.
diagnosis_openai_invalid_response: The AI response did not arrive in a valid format. Please try again.
diagnosis_openai_invalid_key: The OpenAI API key is not valid. Start the app with a real OPENAI_API_KEY.
diagnosis_openai_rate_limit: The AI is temporarily busy or you reached the usage limit. Please try again in a few minutes.
diagnosis_openai_server_error: OpenAI had a temporary problem. Please try again in a few minutes.
diagnosis_default_finding_interpretation: The AI identified this finding as relevant.
diagnosis_default_statement: The AI did not return a textual diagnosis.
diagnosis_default_reasoning: The AI did not return clinical reasoning.
diagnosis_possible_detected: Possible {diagnosis} detected based on the reported symptoms.
diagnosis_preliminary_statement: Preliminary case: the current evidence does not allow confirmation of a specific disease.
diagnosis_initial_evaluation_interpretat: The local engine analyzed symptoms and basic animal data.
diagnosis_reasoning_preliminary: The current evidence is limited and does not support confirming a specific disease. The local engine found {count} useful signals, but recommends adding more symptoms, a physical examination, or an image if there are visible lesions.
diagnosis_general_symptoms: general symptoms reported by the user
diagnosis_add_photo_advice: Adding a photo is recommended when there are visible lesions to refine the case.
diagnosis_reasoning_detected: The local engine identified patterns compatible with {diagnosis} based on {evidence}.
diagnosis_action_record_case: Record the case in the animal's medical history.
diagnosis_action_observe_12h: Keep close observation for the next 12 hours.
diagnosis_action_monitor_fever: Watch for fever and repeat the temperature reading.
diagnosis_action_check_udder: Check the udder for heat, pain, and hardening.
diagnosis_action_separate_milk: Separate the affected milk and do not mix it with healthy production.
diagnosis_action_isolate_animal: Separate the animal from the rest of the herd.
diagnosis_action_avoid_movement: Avoid moving the animal until veterinary review.
diagnosis_action_reduce_stress: Reduce stress and maintain good ventilation.
diagnosis_action_check_hydration: Check hydration and access to clean water.
diagnosis_action_collect_more_evidence: Collect more clinical evidence if the condition persists.
diagnosis_treatment_mastitis_1: Take a milk sample before treatment if possible.
diagnosis_treatment_mastitis_2: Consult the intramammary protocol according to veterinary guidance.
diagnosis_treatment_mastitis_3: Maintain strict hygiene before and after milking.
diagnosis_treatment_foot_mouth_1: Notify a veterinarian or animal health authority quickly.
diagnosis_treatment_foot_mouth_2: Use supportive care and pain control only under professional guidance.
diagnosis_treatment_pneumonia_1: Consult anti-inflammatory and antibiotic management according to veterinary review.
diagnosis_treatment_pneumonia_2: Promote rest, water, and a dry environment.
diagnosis_treatment_gastro_2: Review recent diet and any possible feed change.
diagnosis_treatment_general: Use this result as an initial guide and complement it with clinical evaluation.
diagnosis_isolation_1: Isolate the animal from the rest of the herd.
diagnosis_isolation_2: Disinfect boots, hands, and tools after contact.
diagnosis_isolation_3: Avoid sharing feeders and water sources.
diagnosis_isolation_general: Maintain health surveillance if more animals show similar signs.
diagnosis_monitor_2: Compare appetite, energy, and mobility changes.
diagnosis_monitor_temperature: Repeat the temperature and compare it with the current value.
diagnosis_monitor_mastitis: Watch for changes in milk and udder inflammation.
diagnosis_monitor_pneumonia: Monitor cough, nasal discharge, and breathing effort.
diagnosis_camera_optional: The photo is optional and will serve as additional evidence for the AI.
geolocation_loading: Fetching regional context for the diagnosis...
geolocation_services_disabled: Location services are disabled on this device.
geolocation_permission_denied: Location permission is required to enrich the diagnosis with regional context.
geolocation_permission_denied_forever: Location permission is permanently denied. Enable it from device settings to use regional context.
medical_need_internet_change_photo: You need internet to change the animal photo
medical_need_internet_add_record: You need internet to add medical records
medical_ai_photo_hint:
Photo for AI diagnosis
(tap to take one)
medical_delete_record_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this medical record?
registration_location_missing: No location has been saved from device permission yet.
veterinarian_select_client_first: Add at least one client for the veterinarian.
veterinarian_clients_empty: You have not registered veterinarian clients yet.
veterinarian_workspace_hint: Create or select a client before continuing.
dashboard_no_records: There is not enough data for this month yet.
